## ![][image1] 

# Pricing Guide Template

# 

# 

# Checklist for Auditing Your Current Pricing Guide

- [ ] **Is your guide easy-to-access & mobile friendly?**  
      - [ ] Is it a link (not an attachment that will trigger spam filters)?  
      - [ ] Is it password free & accessible with 1 click?  
      - [ ] Does it load quickly on a phone (think about slow wifi & bad service)  
      - [ ] Is all of the content easily viewable and look professional on all devices?  
      - [ ] Is everything intuitive to navigate (not hidden in sliders or slideshows)?  
            * If built as a hidden page on your website, have you removed the site navigation, footer, any pop-ups from the page and “no-indexed” the page on Google?   
      - [ ] Is all of your pricing easy to find without having to click (it’s not in a collapsible menu or in a slider / slideshow?)  
      - [ ] Have you checked that all the CTA buttons (if you have any for scheduling a consultation) all work on mobile?

      

- [ ] **Is your guide specialized for one specific type of dream client who wants to hire you for one specific service?**   
      - [ ] Have you removed all extra options and services that aren’t relevant to the one specific dream client who will be viewing it?  
      - [ ] Is it customized for just one exact type of service that client inquired for?   
      - [ ] Is it customized for one single location they inquired for with travel expenses included?   
      - [ ] Have you customized all of the images on it to be your best of the best work and to be relevant for just one type of service and one location?

            *(Remember you can always make multiple pricing guides\!)*

- [ ] **Does your guide allow clients to personally connect with you and build trust with you before seeing your prices?**  
      - [ ] If you read it out loud, would it sound like you are talking to that one specific dream couple who is reading it? (Is it written in first person, is it speaking directly to them?)  
      - [ ] Do you personally welcome and speak directly to your client in your own voice at the very top (is it more like a personal love letter than a webpage)?  
      - [ ] Does it have an about section where you share from your heart? (Have you made sure to explicitly share your relevant experience, expertise, and personal values?)  
      - [ ] Do you explicitly state that you CARE and WHY you are passionate about what you do?  
      - [ ] Does it have at least one warm & inviting photo of yourself?  
            * Bonus points for more photos of YOU\!  
      - [ ] Have you added selfies with happy clients?  
      - [ ] Is all of this (and more) on your guide \*before\* your rates are shown?

- [ ] **Does your guide explicitly show and tell clients what makes you unique and different?**  
      - [ ] Do you showcase your differentiators (exactly why you’re unique and what makes your service unique)?  
            * Why should they hire you over someone else?  
            * What can they only get by working with you?   
            * What’s unique about who you are, where you’re from or live, who you work with (your team), connections you have, your values, identity, strengths, talents, motivators, hobbies, interests, experience, education that will benefit your clients?   
      - [ ] Are your differentiators so obvious that they can’t miss them?  
      - [ ] Are you differentiators clearly demonstrated on your guide \*before\* your rates are shown?

      - [ ] **Do you include links to full galleries that will appeal to that specific to that dream client?**  
            * Are all of them 100% relevant to the location and service they’re inquiring about?

      - [ ] **Do you have multiple reviews from your clients spread throughout your guide?**   
            * Do you have client quotes that “prove” what you’re claiming about yourself throughout your guide?

- [ ] ***\*Required for elopement photographers\**** **Do you have sample timelines that show the value of all-day coverage?**  
        
- [ ] **Do you clearly explain the reason why each thing you include in your packages matters to your clients and benefits them?**  
      - [ ] Have you connected each item in your packages to your client’s emotions (explained how it will make them feel?)  
      - [ ] Have you included visuals when possible to communicate why it matters or to \*show\* the difference it will make to them?  
      - [ ] Is all of this explained \*before\* your rates are shown?

- [ ] **Do you have an optimal number of package options (usually 3-4) that are easy to find and understand**   
      - [ ] Is it easy for clients to understand the *differences* between the packages?

- [ ] **Are your packages listed from HIGHEST to LOWEST price?**

- [ ] **Final check**  
      - [ ] Is your guide arranged in a natural flow that would be the same way you would present it to a client on a consultation call?  
      - [ ] Have you shown your guide to 3 NON-PHOTOGRAPHER friends who have never hired you and asked them for brutally honest feedback about what is confusing or missing?

# 

# 

# Pricing Guide Template

---

⚠️Remove Site Navigation, Footer, any Pop-Ups and “No-index” page ⚠️  
---

### Title Block

Beautiful image(s) the specific couple viewing can imagine themselves in.

\[Customized Title or Couples Names\]  
“Brand” your offer as something your dream clients deeply desire

\[Subtitle that mentions “pricing” or “packages” for clarity\]

| Call to Action (Schedule call or Book) |
| :---: |

\*Note \- if this is a package for a specific location \- all the images on the page should be from that location if possible\*

---

### Intro Block

\[Catchy, clever headline (question, bold statement, curiosity), with hook\]

Introduction Text:  Lead with what your couple wants. Speak directly to them as a person and talk about them and their “vision of success.” This should start off like the beginning of a personal email or letter. Look at your initial email for inspiration and make sure this is very personal, “on brand”, and speaking directly to a specific couple—focusing on excitement, emotions, and desires.

---

### About Me Block

Include a warm & inviting photo of yourself that shows your smiling face

\[Say Hi, and Introduce Yourself\]

* Cast yourself as the “guide” in their story (focus on communicating empathy & authority)  
* Share your “why” from your heart (Why do you care on a deeper level? Why is this your passion?)  
* Include what makes you uniquely qualified to photograph their specific day

Add selfies/photos with happy clients where possible

\[Call out & highlight your differentiators\]

What makes you unique & different? Why should they hire you over someone else? What can they only get by working with you? What’s unique about where you live, who you work with (your team), connections you have, your values, identity, strengths, talents, motivators, hobbies, interests, experience, education that will benefit your clients? 

\< Features & Award logos if available \> 

---

\< Client Quote / Testimonial \> 

---

### Your Process / Approach / Style Block

\[Your Unique Process / Approach / Style\]

* Highlight & expand on your most important key differentiators that are the most valuable to your dream clients—specifically tying them to things you do for your clients or big benefits to them of working with you specifically  
  * I.e.   
    * Husband & wife team? How will that affect their experience and their images?  
    * Mountain elopement specialist who grew up in the mountains? How will that affect their experience and their images?   
    * Shoot 35mm film and Super 8? How will that affect their experience and their images?  
    * You have a background as a yoga teacher or a nurse? How does that show up in your process or how you pose clients? How will that affect their experience and their images?  
    * You do full planning as well as photography? How does that affect their planning process, their day-of experience, and their resulting images?

* Make sure to not assume clients know how this works or why each thing is valuable or important. Explicitly state how it benefits them using emotions


---

\[What it’s like to work with me\]

\< Client Quotes / Testimonials, ideally with names & photos \> 

---

\[View full Galleries\]

\< Links to 3-5 full client galleries \> 

---

### “The Experience” / Full “Value Stack” Block

\[Your Unique Offer / What’s Included / The Experience\]

* List out everything that you do for your clients (including unique things you do) between today and final delivery — similar to how you might explain it on a consult call  
* This can include:   
  * Consultations  
  * Planning help  
  * Engagement sessions  
  * Wedding Day  
  * Deliverables  
* Make sure to explain WHY each thing you do/include matters to clients using EMOTIONAL words and clearly explain how it benefits them  
  * Prompt: after listing out WHAT is included, say the 4 magic words “so that you can” in your head to help you make sure you state WHY a client should care that you include this  
* If you have quotes from couples that support/enhance your description \- use them  
* Make sure this doesn't look like a “to do” list for your CLIENTS & don’t make your process look too hard or complicated (it needs to scream “red carpet” and be exactly everything your dream clients need, no more, no less)

---

### Myth-Busting / Objection-Handling Block (Optional)

\[“The myth/objection/misconception that’s on your dream clients mind” \- in their own words\]

* If you dream clients have a common misconception that they believe that holds them back from understanding the value of your offer, dispel this myth before showing your rates

---

\< Client Quotes / Testimonials, ideally with names & photos \> 

---

### Packages Title Block

\[Title that mentions “pricing” or “packages” for clarity\]

\[Subheadline that “brands” your offer as something your dream clients deeply desire and highlights your differentiators\]

---

### Highest Package Block

\[Package Name\]

“Value Stack”

* Include everything you include in this package  
* Illustrate with a relevant photograph of a happy client  
* Highlight the benefits available in this highest package that aren’t available in lower priced packages  
  * Extra hours  
  * Extra Services  
  * Included extras

\[$ Package Price\]

---

### Top-Middle Package Block

\[Package Name\]

“Value Stack”

* Include everything you include in this package  
* Illustrate with a relevant photograph of a happy client  
* Highlight the benefits available in this package that aren’t available in lower priced packages  
  * Extra hours  
  * Extra Services  
  * Included extras

\[$ Package Price\]

---

### Lower-Middle Package Block (Optional)

\[Package Name\]

“Value Stack”

* Include everything you include in this package  
* Illustrate with a relevant photograph of a happy client  
* Highlight the benefits available in this package that aren’t available in lower priced packages  
  * Extra hours  
  * Extra Services  
  * Included extras

\[$ Package Price\]

---

### Base Package Block 

\[Package Name\]

“Value Stack”

* Include everything you include in this package  
* Illustrate with a relevant photograph of a happy client  
* Highlight any limitations on this package, that are removed by booking a higher priced package

\[$ Package Price\]

---

### Timeline Block (Critical for Elopement Photographers)

\[Sample timeline/timelines demonstrating the value of all-day & multi-day coverage\]

---

### Attractive add-on Block (optional)

\[If you offer anything additional a-la-carte that’s highly desired by at least 25% of your clients, list it here\]

---

\< Client Quotes / Testimonials, ideally with names & photos \> 

\<Links to view reviews on independent, 3rd party sources\>

---

### Next Steps Block

\[What’s next?\]

Encourage the couple to take the next step in your process i.e.

* Email me  
* Schedule a call  
* Lets get started  
* Reserve your Date

| Call to Action (Schedule call or Book) |
| :---: |

---

\< Client Quotes / Testimonials, ideally with names & photos \> 

---

### FAQ Block (optional)

\[Frequently Asked Questions\]

* If a perfect-fit couple scrolled this far down, what questions could they have that are stopping them from getting the process started?  
* This is not the time to cover your policies or what’s in your contract. Don’t open “cans of worms” or bring up possible objections that aren’t on their mind at this stage.  
* All of the answers to the questions on this block should be answered with a “yes” and reassure clients that you are the right fit


---

### Final CTA Block 

\[Call to Action\]  
Encourage the couple to take the next step in your process i.e.

* Email me  
* Schedule a call  
* Lets get started.

| Call to Action (Schedule call or Book) |
| :---: |

---
